mapper.select:
/* oms-master-OrCloseXct-sql-oracle.xml selectOrderCloseCenterHdCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TORDER_MST_DDLN_CT A INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

/* oms-master-OrCloseXct-sql-oracle.xml selectCritMonthList */ SELECT TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) + (-(24 - gs.n)) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YYYYMM') AS FIELD1, TO_CHAR((DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) + (-(24 - gs.n)) * INTERVAL '1 month'), 'YY.FMMM') AS FIELD2 FROM generate_series(1, 24) AS gs(n) ORDER BY FIELD1 DESC

/* oms-master-OrCloseXct-sql-oracle.xml selectOwnerOrderType */ SELECT OR_TYPE_CD AS FIELD1 , OR_TYPE_NAME AS FIELD2 , IBYN AS FIELD3 , OBYN AS FIELD4 , ORDER_ATTR AS FIELD5 , OWKEY AS FIELD6 FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} AND DELYN = 'N'
